_comment: Per-NPC Fish Audio voice picks (curated 2026-07-07, no audio generated yet). One unique reference_id per named character; DEALER/CLERK reuse their pinned voices.json refs. Verify with findvoice.js / a test TTS before committing lines to a voice.

MARISOL.title: Latina
MARISOL.why: confident calm-and-cool Latina accent, matches 30s vibrant woman
